name: Validate plan grids UI matrix presentation layer loading -- @1.1

steps.name: Given the user opens the corporate travel portal application homepage
And the user dismisses initial overlay login alerts if present
When the user navigates into the Travel Insurance matrix panel page
When the user loads test metrics from row "1" inside CSV file "data/insurance.csv"
And the user configures the flow map targeting destination country from data
And the user configures traveler volume parameters from data
And the user clicks the explore plans button to execute searches
Then the choice of insurance plan grid matrix structure must load successfully

fullName: Travel Insurance Form Validations and Layout Checkpoints: Validate plan grids UI matrix presentation layer loading
